tool.name: Windsurf
tool.description: Standalone coding IDE shaped by major 2025 acquisition turbulence and later Cognition ownership.
tool.statusNote: OpenAI acquisition deal collapsed; Google hired key staff; Cognition acquired remaining product and brand.
tool.logoNotes: Official Windsurf favicon/icon asset from the owner-controlled site (`/favicon.svg`). Checked-in copy preserves the vendor-provided cream background tile and adds a title for accessibility, so it is source-verified but not byte-identical.
tool.practitionerNote: Can be attractive for teams chasing agentic coding workflows, but ownership churn means larger enterprises should validate roadmap stability before standardizing.

dataResidency.detail: EU residency via Frankfurt (Enterprise); US default; FedRAMP High via AWS GovCloud.

deployment.detail: Cloud, Hybrid (customer data + Windsurf compute), and fully self-hosted (Docker/K8s, private LLM).

auditLogging.detail: Audit logging on Enterprise Hybrid and Self-hosted only; not in the cloud SaaS tier.

soc2.detail: SOC 2 Type II; annual pen testing.

iso27001.detail: Not stated on the Windsurf security page; post-Cognition-acquisition status unverified.

iso42001.detail: No ISO 42001 certification found for Windsurf/Cognition.

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary SaaS; 2025 ownership turbulence (Cognition acquisition) adds roadmap risk.
